evals.name: explain-basic
evals.expected_output: Structured diff report covering added, removed, modified CRs with per-CR detail. Should NOT ask for partner policies.

evals.name: merge-basic
evals.prompt: upgrade my policies from 4.18 to 4.20, policies are in evals/files/partner-basic
evals.expected_output: Merged PolicyGenerator YAML preserving partner customizations with reference updates applied. Partner naming preserved. No optional CRs added.

evals.name: merge-pinned
evals.prompt: upgrade my policies from 4.18 to 4.20, policies are in evals/files/partner-pinned
evals.expected_output: Merged output where intentionally pinned versions are flagged for review, not auto-updated.
